en.eNote: No meals logged for Jun 25 – Jul 1 (last intake log: Jun 14), so the energy and burn charts assume the 2,000 kcal plan. Garmin active burn averaged 494 kcal/day, peaking 1,114 on Friday's swim block. Wednesday (Jul 1) just starting.
en.bNote: Net exercise = Garmin active calories; standing BMR 2,414. Intake assumes 2,000 kcal all seven days (none logged after Jun 14), so the implied balance ≈ −908 kcal/day is exercise-driven, not measured. Wednesday (Jul 1) just starting.
en.wNote: Bridge shows the last logged meals (Jun 12–14) — no intake was logged for the displayed week. Negative balance = deficit.
en.i1t: Friday's swim block was the week's peak
en.i1: Friday stacked a 2.1 km pool set (avg 131 / max 158, the week's hardest swim) with an 873 m open-water swim — 3h36 combined and 1,511 active kcal, more than any other day this week.
en.i2t: Three strength days anchored the block
en.i2: Strength Thu, Sat and Tue ran avg HR 113 / 108 / 113, maxes 154 / 147 / 147 over 74, 53 and 63 min. Hevy still hasn't synced this week's lifts, so lifted volume — and any new per-set HR peaks — aren't in yet; the next refresh will fill them.
en.i3: Monday's pool intervals (500 + 8×200 + 100, 2.2 km, avg HR 130 / max 157, 773 kcal in 61 min) put a sharp aerobic stimulus on top of the strength work.
en.i4t: Recovery held; HRV is the watch-point
en.i4: Last night reset well — a full 7h19 (score 84) — but this morning HRV eased to 37 (−4 under the 7-day avg of 41), with RHR 55 and stress 18. The dip likely reflects the week's accumulated load, not last night; nothing alarming, but it argues for keeping today's swim aerobic rather than maximal.
en.rec: A full week of work: three strength days (Thu, Sat, Tue — avg HR 113 / 108 / 113), Friday's double swim (2.1 km pool + 873 m open water, 3h36 / 1,511 kcal) as the standout, and Monday's 2.2 km pool intervals (avg 130 / max 157, 773 kcal). Sunday was the only full rest; active burn totalled 3,460 kcal across the seven days. Recovery held through the block and last night reset well — 7h19 / score 84 — though morning HRV softened to 37. Today's plan is swim intervals: a good aerobic fit for a recovered morning, keep the hard 200s controlled. Next 72h tracks the plan — Wed swim intervals, Thu squat, Fri rest. This week's Hevy lifts still haven't synced (tonnage and per-set peaks pending). No meals logged after Jun 14, so intake shows the assumed 2,000 plan.
en.foot: Data: 2026-06-25 → 2026-07-01 · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu via Freddy
en.foot2: plan: Mon swim · Tue hack squat · Wed swim intervals · Thu squat · Fri rest · Sat trap-bar DL · Sun rest/hike/bike

hr.k3d: 3 treninga snage · Hevy volumen u tijeku
hr.eNote: Nema zabilježenih obroka za 25.6. – 1.7. (zadnji unos: 14.6.), pa grafovi energije i potrošnje pretpostavljaju planskih 2.000 kcal. Garmin aktivna potrošnja prosj. 494 kcal/dan, vrhunac 1.114 na petkovom plivanju. Srijeda (1.7.) tek počinje.
hr.bNote: Neto trening = Garmin aktivne kalorije; standardni BMR 2.414. Unos pretpostavlja 2.000 kcal svih sedam dana (ništa zabilježeno nakon 14.6.), pa je implicirana bilanca ≈ −908 kcal/dan posljedica treninga, ne mjerena. Srijeda (1.7.) tek počinje.
hr.wNote: Most prikazuje zadnje zabilježene obroke (12.–14.6.) — za prikazani tjedan nema unosa. Negativna bilanca = deficit.
hr.i1t: Petkovo plivanje bilo je vrhunac tjedna
hr.i1: Petak je spojio bazenskih 2,1 km (prosj. 131 / maks 158, najteže plivanje tjedna) s plivanjem na otvorenom 873 m — ukupno 3h36 i 1.511 aktivnih kcal, više nego ijedan drugi dan.
hr.i2t: Tri dana snage nosila su blok
hr.i2: Strength čet, sub i uto: prosj. puls 113 / 108 / 113, maks 154 / 147 / 147 kroz 74, 53 i 63 min. Hevy još nije sinkronizirao dizanja ovog tjedna, pa volumen — i novi puls po seriji — još nisu uneseni; sljedeći refresh će ih popuniti.
hr.i3: Ponedjeljkovi bazenski intervali (500 + 8×200 + 100, 2,2 km, prosj. puls 130 / maks 157, 773 kcal u 61 min) dodali su oštar aerobni podražaj na rad snage.
hr.i4t: Oporavak drži; HRV je točka za praćenje
hr.i4: Sinoć se dobro resetiralo — punih 7h19 (ocjena 84) — ali jutros je HRV pao na 37 (−4 ispod 7-dnevnog prosjeka 41), uz RHR 55 i stres 18. Pad vjerojatno odražava nakupljeno tjedno opterećenje, a ne sinoćnju noć; ništa alarmantno, ali sugerira da današnje plivanje ostane aerobno, a ne maksimalno.
hr.rec: Pun tjedan rada: tri dana snage (čet, sub, uto — prosj. puls 113 / 108 / 113), petkovo dvostruko plivanje (2,1 km bazen + 873 m otvorena voda, 3h36 / 1.511 kcal) kao istaknuto, te ponedjeljkovi bazenski intervali 2,2 km (prosj. 130 / maks 157, 773 kcal). Nedjelja je bila jedini potpuni odmor; aktivna potrošnja ukupno 3.460 kcal kroz sedam dana. Oporavak je držao kroz blok, a sinoć se dobro resetiralo — 7h19 / ocjena 84 — iako je jutarnji HRV omekšao na 37. Današnji plan su intervali plivanja: dobar aerobni izbor za odmorno jutro, drži teške 200-ice pod kontrolom. Sljedeća 72h prati plan — sri intervali, čet squat, pet odmor. Dizanja ovog tjedna još nisu sinkronizirana (tonaža i puls po seriji čekaju). Nema zabilježenih obroka nakon 14.6., pa unos prikazuje pretpostavljenih 2.000.
hr.foot: Podaci: 25.6. → 1.7.2026. · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu putem Freddyja
hr.foot2: plan: pon plivanje · uto hack squat · sri intervali · čet squat · pet odmor · sub trap-bar MD · ned odmor/planina/bicikl
